response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. The audio phonetically matches the burnt-in lyrics, which are the primary truth for transcription. 2. The Reference JSON contains the opening lyrics of the song, but the video segment features a different portion (the chorus and subsequent verses); I have ignored the irrelevant JSON lyrics and followed the audio. 3. The video segment contains a song followed by a comedic superhero skit; I have transcribed both, including relevant on-screen titles for characters and episode information. 4. Timestamps are tightly wrapped to vocal bursts, with logical splits for long phrases to ensure readability and sync.

subtitles.original: 第3話 闇を超えて！ ねぽらぼ絆ビームで奇跡を起こせ！

subtitles.original: やっぱり、ねぽらぼだね！
subtitles.english: As expected of NePoLaBo!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: ねぽらぼ、はい！
subtitles.english: Ne-Po-La-Bo, go!

subtitles.original: だいふく、やっと来てくれたー！
subtitles.english: Daifuku, you finally came!

subtitles.original: ゆるさない... ゆるさない...
subtitles.english: I won't forgive you... I won't forgive you...

subtitles.original: だ、だいふく？
subtitles.english: D-Daifuku?

subtitles.original: やみふく
subtitles.english: Yamifuku

subtitles.original: まさか、あれは！
subtitles.english: No way, that is...!

subtitles.original: ラミィにかまってもらえず、負の感情が爆発して...
subtitles.english: He exploded with negative emotions from Lamy not paying attention to him...

subtitles.original: 闇落ちした、やみふく...
subtitles.english: He's fallen into darkness, Yamifuku...

subtitles.original: そんな、だいふく、元に戻って！
subtitles.english: No way, Daifuku, come back to normal!

subtitles.original: うるさい！
subtitles.english: Shut up!

subtitles.original: こうなったら、力ずくでも元に戻してあげる！
subtitles.english: If it's come to this, I'll bring you back to normal even if it takes force!

subtitles.original: 元に戻ってー！
subtitles.english: Come back to normal!

subtitles.original: ど、どうだ？
subtitles.english: H-How was that?

subtitles.original: くっそー！
subtitles.english: Damn it!

subtitles.original: だいふく！
subtitles.english: Daifuku!

subtitles.original: あ、ラミィ待って！
subtitles.english: Wait, Lamy!

subtitles.original: ちっくしょー！
subtitles.english: Darn it!

subtitles.original: かまって...
subtitles.english: Pay attention to me...

subtitles.original: ヤミィ
subtitles.english: Yamy

subtitles.original: わー、ラミィちゃんが闇落ちさせられたー！
subtitles.english: Waa, Lamy-chan was made to fall into darkness!

subtitles.original: これでラミィとずっと一緒だ。
subtitles.english: Now I'll be with Lamy forever.

subtitles.original: ラミィが相手でも止めるしかないよ。
subtitles.english: Even if it's Lamy, we have to stop her.

subtitles.original: 確かに。ラミィはタフだしね。ま、ちょっとぐらい痛くても平気でしょ。
subtitles.english: True. Lamy is tough. Well, she'll be fine even if it hurts a bit.

subtitles.original: あ、ちょうどいいところに。ゆきみ、手貸して。
subtitles.english: Oh, just in time. Yukimi, lend me a hand.
